title: Flamingo - Software update for headset and charge case
scenario: DFU update for headset and charge case completes successfully via "Update All" button on device home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the headset and charge case are both connected and visible.
3. Locate and tap the "Update All" button on the Home screen.
4. Confirm the DFU (Device Firmware Update) initiation prompt if presented.
5. Wait for the update process to complete for the headset.
6. Wait for the update process to complete for the charge case.
7. After completion, verify the firmware version displayed on the Home screen or Device Settings screen matches the latest available firmware for both devices.
expected: Both the headset and charge case successfully update to the latest firmware via the "Update All" button, with no errors during the process. The firmware versions shown in the app match the latest available versions.
